description_long: This lamp features an ornate, classical design with a richly decorated pedestal base and an elaborate upper structure. The base is rectangular with intricate reliefs and a sunburst motif on the front, surrounded by gold and bronze tones. Rising from the base, the lamp has a sculpted, openwork frame with curling, leaf-like elements and a central crossbar, suggesting a historical or religious influence. The upper section is crowned with additional decorative flourishes, giving the lamp a regal and ceremonial appearance. The surface is painted in a palette of gold, bronze, white, and subtle green hues, with visible aging and patina effects. The lamp appears to be made primarily of cast metal, possibly bronze or brass, with painted and gilded details.
description: An ornate, classical lamp with a richly decorated pedestal base, sunburst motif, and elaborate gold-toned sculpted upper frame. The design features intricate reliefs, curling leaf elements, and a regal, ceremonial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sunburst motif on the base and the full ornate upper frame with curling gold elements.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the sculpted frame and the relief work on the side of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the pedestal and the symmetrical structure of the upper frame, with less decorative detail than the front.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side reliefs and the openwork nature of the upper frame, with visible patina and color variation.
